title: 2 Pack Fly Swatter - Durable Telescopic Stainless Steel Handle, Extendable Fly Swat Set for Indoor Outdoor Home Garden Mosquito Wasp Bug Insect (Black)
features: Extendable: Equipped with a high-quality stainless steel extendable pole that can be extended up to 30 inches, easily meeting the needs of catching flies at a distance. The pole is sturdy and stable, making it difficult to bend during use, ensuring smooth operation.

Thickened hitting surface: Features an enlarged net design to effectively expand the striking range and significantly improve fly-catching accuracy. Made from durable PP material, it remains intact and resistant to deformation even when contacting hard objects, ensuring long-lasting use.

Anti-slip handle: The PVC handle is ergonomically designed to fit the contours of the palm, providing a comfortable and secure grip. The surface features anti-slip texturing, allowing for easy control even when hands are sweaty.
Portable design: The compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry. When storing, the long pole can be retracted to save space, making it convenient for both home storage and on-the-go use.
Versatile use: Suitable for kitchens, dining rooms, offices, balconies, and more, quickly resolving fly-related issues to create a clean and comfortable living and working environment.
